_说明: 这是新格式的参考模板，复制需要的部分到你的 modelData.json 里使用

_格式一：纯文字（最简单）.示例: Check if the condenser fan blade is hitting any foreign objects.

示例.text: Ask the customer to record a video and send it to us for analysis.
示例.red: (Make sure to upload it into the system)

示例.text: The entire capillary tube should only be replaced if it is completely beyond repair.

steps: Check if the fan motor is defective.
Check whether there is any noise caused by loose screws.
Inspect the compressor for abnormal noise.

示例.text: If the door gasket is damaged, suggest the customer replace it themselves.
示例.red: Within warranty → part covered; customer self-install; no technician dispatch.

steps.text: If all fans are not working, please check if there is 115V output on the controller board.
steps.red: (If there is no voltage, replace the controller board)

steps: If only one fan is not working, replace the fan directly.

示例.text: MGF, MSF series – Door to Drawer Replacement Video

_完整字段说明.text: 主要文字，黑色显示（必填）
_完整字段说明.red: 补充说明，红色显示（可选）
_完整字段说明.color: 补充说明的颜色，默认 red，可改 orange（可选）
_完整字段说明.steps: 编号步骤列表，红色显示，可以是字符串或对象（可选）
_完整字段说明.link: 单个链接 { label, url }（可选）
_完整字段说明.video: 视频文件路径，自动嵌入播放器（可选）
